title: More Food and Potions
description: Adds 20+ New Foods and Potions which give various powerful effect upon consumption.
body:
## **Crafting**
  - All recipes are in the gallery
  - All recipes are for the vanilla crafting table
  - All recipes will also be given to you in-game

## **New Foods**
1. Backfire Potato - Reverses active negative potion effects
2. Compact Chorus - Random teleportation within 1000 blocks
3. Compressed Food Bar - Restores full hunger and saturation, stacks up to 99
4. Copper Apple - Summons lightning on all entites within 10 blocks
5. Emerald Apple - Villagers and Wandering Traders within 10 blocks will be leashed to you
6. Enchanted Cooked Rabbit - Speed 20 for 10 seconds
7. Enchanted Feather - Slowing Falling for 15 seconds
8. Enchanted Golden Apple Plus - Absorption 20 and Resistance III for 10 minutes, removes all negative effects
9. Enchanted Golden Carrot - Night Vision for 10 minutes
10. Enchanted Kelp - Dolphin's Grace V and Water Breathing for 5 minutes
11. Enchanted Steak - Strength IV for 30 seconds
12. Golden Apple Plus - Regeneration IV and Absorption IV for 10 seconds
13. Health Apple - Grants Health Boost I for 20 minutes when used in early morning right after sunrise
14. Honey Milk - Removes all negative effects and Levitation effect
15. Magical Glow Berries - Glowing for 10 seconds and converts air to light within 10 blocks
16. Rabbit's Feet Stew - Jump Boost V for 3 minutes
17. Sweetened Cookie - Increases daytime by 300s

## **New Potions**
1. Fireball Potion - Launches an Fireball toward direction of the cursor
2. Firework Potion - Launches the player 127 blocks into the air. Use with caution.
3. Lightning Potion - Launches Lightning bolts toward direction of the cursor
4. Potion of the Sea - Permanent Conduit Power III and Dolphin's Grace III
5. Powered Glowing Potion - Gives Glowing for 3 minutes to all entites in 100 blocks raidus
6. Beacon Potion - Grant Player a Permanent Effect of the Beacon
    - Iron: Strength II
    - Gold: Haste II
    - Emerald: Speed II
    - Diamond: Regeneration II
    - Netherite Ingot: Resistance II
    - Netherite Block: Strength III, Haste III, Speed III, Regeneration III, Resistance III


Note: Permanent Potion effects can still be lost through milk drinking, death, and etc...

## **Credits**
- Misode Recipe Generator: https://misode.github.io/recipe
- Misode Advancement Generator:  https://misode.github.io/advancement
- Project Icon generated by AI: https://gencraft.com/generate

## **Others**
Feel free to leave any suggestions for other custom food and potions that should be added in the comment section on my panet minecraft page: [https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/custom-food-5837974/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/custom-food-5837974/)

*Implementation could take a very very long time
